import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn cap_word(_ w: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(w)
  if n == 0
    w
  else
    match string.byte_at(w, 0)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 97 and b <= 122
        let upper = string.from_byte(b - 32)
        let rest = string.substring(w, 1, n)
        "#{upper}#{rest}"
      else
        w
      end
    when None
      w
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut word = ""
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          if string.len(word) > 0
            let capped = cap_word(word)
            if first
              result = "#{capped}"
              first = false
            else
              result = "#{result} #{capped}"
            end
            word = ""
          end
        else
          word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if string.len(word) > 0
      let capped = cap_word(word)
      if first
        result = "#{capped}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{capped}"
      end
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
